message:
style: standardize import ordering and collapse verbose conditionals

Sort imports alphabetically within use statements across src/lib.rs and all
test files to follow rustfmt conventions. Collapse two multi-line if-else
blocks in CMA-ES parameter initialization (population size and max
evaluations) into single-line form for improved readability. No functional
changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
